title: Methods, systems, and articles of manufacture for automatic fill or completion for application software and software services
abstract: A computing platform identifies one or more characteristics of a user accessing application software or a software service via a user interface and a field to be filled or completed in the user interface of the application software or a software service. The computing platform further determines and presents, at one or more automatic fill or completion modules that are stored at least partially in memory and function in tandem with one or more computer processors in the computing platform, a list of one or more completion candidates in the user interface of the application software or a software service at least by performing one or more incremental searches based in part or in whole upon the one or more characteristics. The field is then populated with a completion candidate from the list of one or more completion candidates.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1 . A machine implemented method for automatic fill or completion for application software or software service, the method being performed by at least a computing platform and comprising: a computing platform including one or more servers that are communicatively connected via one or more network elements and identifying one or more characteristics of a user accessing an application software or a software service via a user interface; the computing platform identifying a field to be filled or completed in the user interface of the application software or a software service; determining and presenting, at one or more automatic fill or completion modules that are stored at least partially in memory and function in tandem with one or more computer processors in the computing platform, a list of one or more completion candidates in the user interface of the application software or a software service at least by performing one or more incremental searches based in part or in whole upon the one or more characteristics; and populating the field with a completion candidate from the list of one or more completion candidates. 2. The machine implemented method of claim 1 , further comprising: Identifying or generating a user profile for the user; identifying the one or more characteristics from the user profile; and identifying corresponding one or more characteristics from a plurality of other users for the application software or a software service. 3. The machine implemented method of claim 1 , further comprising: the computing platform identifying one or more models and one or more libraries based in part or in whole upon the one or more characteristics of the user and information about the field to be filled or completed. 4. The machine implemented method of claim 3, further comprising: the computing platform identifying one or more data models that describe input data for filling or completing at least the field; and the computing platform identifying one or more predictor models that suggest or predict at least some of the list of one or more completion candidates as the one or more models based in part or in whole upon the one or more data models. 5. The machine implemented method of claim 4, further comprising: the computing platform determining the list of one or more completion candidates by performing the one or more incremental searches with the one or more predictor models. 6. The machine implemented method of claim 4, further comprising: the computing platform identifying a user input that comprises at least one or more characters from the user via the user interface; and the computing platform determining the list of one or more completion candidates by performing the one or more incremental searches with the one or more predictor models based in part or in whole upon the user input. 7. The machine implemented method of claim 6, further comprising: the computing platform populating the field with the completion candidate from the list of one or more completion candidates based in part or in whole upon one or more result sets of the one or more incremental searches by the one or more predictor models and further based in part or in whole upon the user input. 8. The machine implemented method of claim 7, further comprising: the computing platform identifying an additional user input that comprises at least one or more additional characters from the user via the user interface. 9. The machine implemented method of claim 8, further comprising: the one or more predictor models in the computing platform determining whether the list of one or more completion candidates is to be modified based in part or in whole upon the user input and the additional user input. 10. The machine implemented method of claim 9, further comprising: modifying the list of one or more completion candidates into a modified list of one or more completion candidates when it is determined that the list of one or more completion candidates is to be modified; and presenting the modified list of one or more completion candidates in the user interface to the user for the field. 1 1 . The machine implemented method of claim 1 , further comprising: the computing platform presenting the list of one or more completion candidates in the user interface to the user before the user provides any input for the field; and the computing platform populating the filed with the completion candidate before the user provides any input for the field. 12. The machine implemented method of claim 1 , further comprising: the computing platform generating a structured output in an electronic document that does not include any search engine results pages. 13. A machine implemented method for automatic fill or completion for application software or software service, comprising: a computing platform including one or more servers that are communicatively connected via one or more network elements and identifying one or more electronic files for a user accessing an application software or a software service via a user interface; identifying, at one or more automatic fill or completion modules that are stored at least partially in memory and function in tandem with one or more computer processors in the computing platform, user data at least by performing data curation for the one or more electronic files; identifying one or more software application or software services for the one or more electronic files; and populating one or more fields for the one or more software application or software services with the user data identified from the data curation. 14. The machine implemented method of claim 13, further comprising: determining, at the one or more automatic fill or completion modules, whether the one or more electronic files include recognizable contents that are understandable by the one or more automatic fill or completion modules; identifying an electronic file from the one or more electronic files; and preprocessing the electronic file when the electronic file is determined not to include the recognizable contents. 15. The machine implemented method of claim 14, further comprising: identifying a field in the electronic file; determining semantics of the field; classifying corresponding data for the field in the electronic file based in part or in whole upon the semantics; and identifying the corresponding data as a part of the user data at least by managing the corresponding data with one or more data structures. 16. The machine implemented method of claim 14, further comprising: validating the corresponding data for the field at least by performing a consistency check for the field; and updating the corresponding data for the field when results of validating the corresponding data for the field indicate one or more inconsistencies. 17. The machine implemented method of claim 14, further comprising: identifying a class of information needed for populating the field; identifying data for completing the field from the user data based in part or in whole upon the class of information; and populating the field with the data identified from the user data. 18. The machine implemented method of claim 15, further comprising: validating the data identified from the user data for the field at least by performing a consistency check for the field; presenting the data identified from the user data for review or confirmation based in part or in whole upon results of validating the data; invoking a machine learning module or an artificial intelligence module to update one or more other modules in the one or more automatic fill or completion modules; and tracking the field and the data populated into the field in a data structure. 19. A system for automatic fill or completion for application software or software service, comprising: a computing platform that includes one or more servers that are communicatively connected via one or more network elements and is at least to: identify one or more characteristics of a user accessing an application software or a software service via a user interface; identify a field to be filled or completed in the user interface of the application software or a software service; determine and present, at one or more automatic fill or completion modules that are stored at least partially in memory and function in tandem with one or more computer processors in the computing platform, a list of one or more completion candidates in the user interface of the application software or a software service at least by performing one or more incremental searches based in part or in whole upon the one or more characteristics; and populate the field with a completion candidate from the list of one or more completion candidates. The system of claim 19, wherein the computing platform is further to: identify one or more models and one or more libraries based in part or in whole upon the one or more characteristics of the user and information about the field to be filled or completed; identify one or more data models that describe input data for filling or completing at least the field; identify one or more predictor models that suggest or predict at least some of the list of one or more completion candidates as the one or more models based in part or in whole upon the one or more data models; and determine the list of one or more completion candidates by performing the one or more incremental searches with the one or more predictor models. The system of claim 20, wherein the computing platform is further to: identify a user input that comprise at least one or more characters from the user via the user interface; determine the list of one or more completion candidates by performing the one or more incremental searches with the one or more predictor models based in part or in whole upon the user input; and populate the field with the completion candidate from the list of one or more completion candidates based in part or in whole upon one or more result sets of the one or more incremental searches by the one or more predictor models and further based in part or in whole upon the user input. 22. The system of claim 21 , wherein the computing platform is further to: identify an additional user input that comprise at least one or more additional characters from the user via the user interface; and determine whether the list of one or more completion candidates is to be modified based in part or in whole upon the user input and the additional user input. 23. A computer program product comprising a non-transitory machine readable storage medium having stored thereupon a sequence of instructions which, when executed by a computing platform, causes the connected device to perform a set of acts for automatic fill or completion for application software or software service, the set of acts being performed by at least the computing platform and comprising: a computing platform including one or more servers that are communicatively connected via one or more network elements and identifying one or more characteristics of a user accessing an application software or a software service via a user interface; the computing platform identifying a field to be filled or completed in the user interface of the application software or a software service; determining and presenting, at one or more automatic fill or completion modules that are stored at least partially in memory and function in tandem with one or more computer processors in the computing platform, a list of one or more completion candidates in the user interface of the application software or a software service at least by performing one or more incremental searches based in part or in whole upon the one or more characteristics; and populating the field with a completion candidate from the list of one or more completion candidates. 24. The computer program product of claim 23, the set of acts further comprising: the computing platform presenting the list of one or more completion candidates in the user interface to the user before the user provides any input for the field; and the computing platform populating the filed with the completion candidate before the user provides any input for the field. 25. The computer program product of claim 23, the set of acts further comprising: the computing platform generating a structured output in an electronic document that does not include any search engine results pages. 26. The computer program product of claim 23, the set of acts further comprising: the computing platform identifying one or more models and one or more libraries based in part or in whole upon the one or more characteristics of the user and information about the field to be filled or completed; the computing platform identifying one or more data models that describe input data for filling or completing at least the field; the computing platform identifying one or more predictor models that suggest or predict at least some of the list of one or more completion candidates as the one or more models based in part or in whole upon the one or more data models; the computing platform determining the list of one or more completion candidates by performing the one or more incremental searches with the one or more predictor models; the computing platform identifying a user input that comprise at least one or more characters from the user via the user interface; and 

 the computing platform determining the list of one or more completion candidates by performing the one or more incremental searches with the one or more predictor models based in part or in whole upon the user input. 27. A system for automatic fill or completion for application software or software service, comprising: a computing platform that includes one or more servers that are communicatively connected via one or more network elements and is at least to: identify one or more electronic files for a user accessing an application software or a software service via a user interface; identify, at one or more automatic fill or completion modules that are stored at least partially in memory and function in tandem with one or more computer processors in the computing platform, user data at least by performing data curation for the one or more electronic files; identify one or more software application or software services for the one or more electronic files; and populate one or more fields for the one or more software application or software services with the user data identified from the data curation. 28. The system of claim 27, wherein the computing platform is further to: determine, at the one or more automatic fill or completion modules, whether the one or more electronic files include recognizable contents that are understandable by the one or more automatic fill or completion modules; identify an electronic file from the one or more electronic files; and preprocess the electronic file when the electronic file is determined not to include the recognizable contents. 29. The system of claim 28, wherein the computing platform is further to: identify a field in the electronic file; determine semantics of the field; classify corresponding data for the field in the electronic file based in part or in whole upon the semantics; and identify the corresponding data as a part of the user data at least by managing the corresponding data with one or more data structures. 30. The system of claim 20, wherein the computing platform is further to: validate the data identified from the user data for the field at least by performing a consistency check for the field; present the data identified from the user data for review or confirmation based in part or in whole upon results of validating the data; invoke a machine learning module or an artificial intelligence module to update one or more other modules in the one or more automatic fill or completion modules; and track the field and the data populated into the field in a data structure. 31 . A computer program product comprising a non-transitory machine readable storage medium having stored thereupon a sequence of instructions which, when executed by a computing platform, causes the connected device to perform a set of acts for automatic fill or completion for application software or software service, the set of acts being performed by at least the computing platform and comprising: a computing platform including one or more servers that are communicatively connected via one or more network elements and identifying one or more electronic files for a user accessing an application software or a software service via a user interface; identifying, at one or more automatic fill or completion modules that are stored at least partially in memory and function in tandem with one or more computer processors in the computing platform, user data at least by performing data curation for the one or more electronic files; identifying one or more software application or software services for the one or more electronic files; and populating one or more fields for the one or more software application or software services with the user data identified from the data curation. 32. The computer program product of claim 31 , the set of acts further comprising: the computing platform presenting the list of one or more completion candidates in the user interface to the user before the user provides any input for the field; and the computing platform populating the filed with the completion candidate before the user provides any input for the field. 33. The computer program product of claim 31 , the set of acts further comprising: the computing platform generating a structured output in an electronic document that does not include any search engine results pages. 34. The computer program product of claim 31 , the set of acts further comprising: the computing platform identifying one or more models and one or more libraries based in part or in whole upon the one or more characteristics of the user and information about the field to be filled or completed; the computing platform identifying one or more data models that describe input data for filling or completing at least the field; and the computing platform identifying one or more predictor models that suggest or predict at least some of the list of one or more completion candidates as the one or more models based in part or in whole upon the one or more data models. 35. The computer program product of claim 34, the set of acts further comprising: the computing platform determining the list of one or more completion candidates by performing the one or more incremental searches with the one or more predictor models; the computing platform identifying a user input that comprise at least one or more characters from the user via the user interface; and the computing platform determining the list of one or more completion candidates by performing the one or more incremental searches with the one or more predictor models based in part or in whole upon the user input.
